title: stenocalyx uniflorus
intro: Stenocalyx uniflorus, also known as the "one-flowered stenocalyx," is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae. It is a shrub native to Central and South America, and its bark has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. Stenocalyx uniflorus is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, providing health benefits such as reduced pain and inflammation. The plant is typically prepared in herbal remedies like infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
